mapper.select: SELECT * FROM concert WHERE parentId = 0 ORDER BY startAt ASC
SELECT *, IF(reviewCount > 0, ROUND(totalRating / reviewCount, 1), 0) AS extra__avgRating FROM concert WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT * FROM concert WHERE parentId = #{masterId} ORDER BY performDate ASC
SELECT A.id, A.name, A.profileImg, CC.roleName FROM concertCasting AS CC INNER JOIN artist AS A ON CC.artistId = A.id WHERE CC.concertId = #{concertId}

SELECT SG.name AS extra__gradeName, SG.price AS extra__price, COUNT(S.id) AS remainCount FROM seatGrade AS SG LEFT JOIN seat AS S ON SG.id = S.gradeId AND S.`status` = 'AVAILABLE' WHERE SG.concertId = #{concertId} GROUP BY SG.id

SELECT DISTINCT C.roleName, A.name, A.profileImg FROM concertCasting C JOIN artist A ON C.artistId = A.id WHERE C.concertId IN (SELECT id FROM concert WHERE parentId = #{masterId} OR id = #{masterId})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO concert (title, posterImg, performDate, startDate, endDate, startAt, totalSeats, maxRows, maxCols, price, parentId, bookingStartAt, body, regDate, updateDate) VALUES (#{title}, #{posterImg}, #{performDate}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{startAt}, #{totalSeats}, #{maxRows}, #{maxCols}, #{price}, #{parentId}, #{bookingStartAt}, #{body}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT c.totalSeats AS totalSeats, IFNULL(COUNT(r.id), 0) AS reservedCount, IFNULL(SUM(r.paidPrice), 0) AS revenue FROM concert c LEFT JOIN reservation r ON c.id = r.concertId AND r.status = 'CONFIRMED' WHERE c.id = #{concertId} GROUP BY c.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO seatGrade (regDate, updateDate, concertId, name, price) VALUES (NOW(), NOW(), #{concertId}, #{name}, #{price})
mapper.update: UPDATE concert SET title = #{title}, posterImg = #{posterImg}, performDate = #{performDate}, startAt = #{startAt}, totalSeats = #{totalSeats}, maxRows = #{maxRows}, maxCols = #{maxCols}, price = #{price}, bookingStartAt = #{bookingStartAt}, body = #{body}, updateDate = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE concert SET `status` = #{status}, updateDate = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, price FROM seatGrade WHERE concertId = #{concertId} ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO seat (regDate, updateDate, concertId, gradeId, rowName, colNumber, `status`) VALUES (NOW(), NOW(), #{concertId}, #{gradeId}, #{row}, #{col}, #{status})
INSERT INTO concertCasting (concertId, artistId, roleName) VALUES (#{concertId}, #{artistId}, #{roleName})
